flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Marywood University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($22.7k → $26.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Marywood University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (56.1% → 49.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Marywood University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.3k → $41.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Marywood University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
